sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, text_value VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, text_value) VALUES (1, 1.5, 'Sample Text'), (2, NULL, 'Another Text'), (3, 3.14, null), (4, 0.0, 'Zero Value');
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, sin(value) AS sin_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t.id, s.sin_value FROM test_table t JOIN temp_table s ON t.id = s.id WHERE s.sin_value IS NOT NULL && t.value > 0.0 GROUP BY t.id, s.sin_value HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY s.sin_value DESC;
SELECT t.id, sinv_drop_inverse(sin(value)) AS dropped_value FROM test_table t WHERE t.value IS NOT NULL AND sinv_drop_inverse(sin(t.value)) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY sin(value)) AS value_count FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE (text_value IS NOT NULL && sinv_drop_inverse(sin(value)) IS NOT NULL) || (text_value IS NULL && value IS NULL);

INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, text_value) SELECT id, value, text_value FROM (SELECT 5 AS id, 2.718 AS value, NULL AS text_value) AS subquery WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table WHERE id = 5);
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE (sin(value) IS NOT NULL) AND (text_value || ' Test' IS NOT NULL) && (value < 3.0) ORDER BY created_at ASC;
SELECT CASE WHEN value IS NOT NULL THEN sinv_drop_inverse(sin(value)) ELSE NULL END AS modified_value FROM test_table WHERE value NOT BETWEEN 0 AND 10;
